title: Shoals Technologies Group Q4 2025 Earnings Summary
text: Q4 2025 revenue reached $148.3 million, up 39% year-over-year from $107.0 million. Gross profit increased to $46.9 million versus $40.2 million, though margins compressed to 31.6% from 37.6%. Operating income was $17.4 million compared to $16.5 million in Q4 2024. Net income totaled $8.1 million versus $7.8 million previously. Full year 2025 revenue grew 19% to $475.3 million from $399.2 million. Full-year net income increased to $33.6 million from $24.1 million. Diluted EPS was $0.20 versus $0.14 year-over-year. Adjusted EBITDA remained essentially flat at $99.5 million. Record backlog and awarded orders reached $747.6 million, up 18% from year-end 2024. Battery energy storage solutions backlog was $67 million. CEO Brandon Moss stated: 2025 was an exceptional year for Shoals. For Q1 2026: Revenue $125-135 million; Adjusted EBITDA $16-21 million. Full year 2026: Revenue $560-600 million; Adjusted EBITDA $110-130 million; Operating cash flow projected at $65-85 million.
